Trust & Verification

Every trade. Every certification. Verified.

TradeMatch enforces the most rigorous accreditation framework in the UK. Before a tradesperson can bid on your job, they pass our multi-layer verification — from licence checks to live insurance validation.

Gas Safe Registered NICEIC Verified CSCS Checked DBS Screened £5M+ Insurance Verified

Our Framework

Nine layers of trust

We don't just take tradespeople at their word. Our automated systems cross-reference every credential against official databases in real time.

01
Identity Verification
Government-issued ID cross-matched with Companies House and sole-trader HMRC records.
02
Licence Check
Direct API queries to Gas Safe, NICEIC, OFTEC, NAPIT and 12 other regulatory bodies.
03
Insurance Validation
Public liability (min £2M) and employer's liability verified via live insurer document scan.
04
DBS Screening
Standard DBS check mandatory; Enhanced DBS required for work in homes with vulnerable occupants.
05
Competence Card
CSCS, SkillCard or trade-equivalent verified for all site and structural work categories.
06
Portfolio Review
Our vetting team manually reviews a sample of past project photos and references before approval.
07
Reference Validation
We contact previous clients directly to confirm work quality and professional conduct.
08
Annual Re-Verification
All credentials are re-checked every 12 months automatically. Lapsed licences trigger instant suspension.

Trade Certifications

Recognised accreditations

We honour the highest certification standards across every trade discipline on the platform.

Regulated
Mandatory
Gas & Heating
All gas work must be carried out by a Gas Safe Registered engineer. We verify registration numbers live against the Gas Safe Register API before any bid is accepted.
Gas Safe OFTEC APHC WaterSafe
Regulated
Mandatory
Electrical
Notifiable electrical work requires Part P compliance. Every electrician on TradeMatch holds a current NICEIC, NAPIT or ELECSA registration certificate.
NICEIC NAPIT ELECSA Part P
Certified
Verified
Tiling & Flooring
Portfolio verification and trade body membership confirm professional standards. NVQ Level 2 or equivalent is the minimum qualification accepted.
CTDA NVQ L2 C&G 6129
Verified
Verified
Plastering & Rendering
Wet trades require demonstrated competency through a portfolio assessment. Our team visually inspects submitted work for finish quality and technical standard.
NVQ L2 FIS Member CSCS
Verified
Verified
Carpentry & Joinery
City & Guilds, NVQ or Institute of Carpenters membership accepted. Structural carpentry additionally requires CSCS card validation.
IoC C&G 6571 NVQ L3 CSCS
Regulated
Mandatory
Building & Extensions
Structural and regulated building work requires membership of FMB, NHBC or equivalent, plus professional indemnity insurance alongside PLI.
FMB NHBC LABC RICS
Verified Trades
14,200+
Active on platform
Why It Matters

Your home.
Protected.

Unverified tradespeople are the number-one source of homeowner complaints in the UK. Our framework exists to give you absolute confidence before a single tool is picked up.

  • Insurance-backed escrow Funds are held securely and only released when you approve the completed work — never before.
  • Automatic licence expiry alerts If a Gas Safe or NICEIC registration lapses mid-project, we notify both parties immediately.
  • Verified reviews only Every review on our platform is linked to a completed, paid job — no fake testimonials, ever.
  • Independent dispute resolution In the event of a dispute, our SLA-governed process reaches a binding decision within 28 days.
Quick Reference

Certification by trade

See exactly which bodies we verify for each category.

Trade Primary Body Secondary Min. Insurance DBS Status
Gas Engineer Gas Safe Register IGEM / APHC £2M PLI Standard Required
Electrician NICEIC / NAPIT ELECSA / Part P £2M PLI Standard Required
Plumber WaterSafe / APHC CIPHE £1M PLI Standard Required
Builder FMB / NHBC LABC / RICS £5M PLI Standard Required
Roofer NFRC CompetentRoofer £2M PLI Standard Required
Carpenter IoC / C&G 6571 NVQ Level 2+ £1M PLI Optional Verified
Plasterer FIS / NVQ L2 Portfolio Review £1M PLI Optional Verified
Tiler CTDA / NVQ L2 Portfolio Review £1M PLI Optional Verified
Landscaper APL / BALI RHS / PA1 £1M PLI Optional Industry
Solar Installer MCS Certified RECC / NAPIT £2M PLI Standard Required
For Tradespeople

Getting verified

Join the UK's most trusted trade platform in three straightforward steps.

Step 01
Submit Your Credentials
Upload your licences, insurance certificates, CSCS card and a photo ID through our secure portal. The whole process takes under 15 minutes.
Step 02
Automated Verification
Our systems instantly cross-check your details against 15+ official databases. Most trades are approved within 24 hours — no waiting weeks.
Step 03
Start Winning Jobs
Once verified, your badge is displayed on every quote you submit. Customers can see your credentials with one tap — building trust before you even arrive.
Join TradeMatch
